serviceLevelObjectives.name: Code Generation API Availability
serviceLevelObjectives.serviceLevelIndicator: Percentage of non-5xx HTTP responses on /v2/react/components
serviceLevelObjectives.errorBudgetPolicy: If error budget drops below 10%, all non-critical feature merges are frozen until reliability is restored.

serviceLevelObjectives.name: Code Generation Latency
serviceLevelObjectives.serviceLevelIndicator: Percentage of successful requests completed in < 1500ms
serviceLevelObjectives.errorBudgetPolicy: Alert Engineering Manager; prioritize performance tech debt in next sprint.

piiMaskingRules: Regex mask any strings matching potential JWT formats
Redact `external_node_id` if it originates from a private customer design file

metrics.name: codegen.asts.generated.total
metrics.description: Total number of React ASTs successfully generated.

metrics.name: codegen.agent.memory.usage
metrics.description: Active memory consumption of the sandbox agent containers.

metrics.name: codegen.llm.latency
metrics.description: Latency of external calls to the LLM vendor API.

dashboards.name: Polyglot Engine - Golden Signals
keyPanels: Traffic: Requests per second (RPS) grouped by endpoint
Saturation: EKS Pod CPU and Memory utilization

dashboards.name: Generation SLA & Business Metrics
keyPanels: Current 28-day SLO Error Budget Burn Rate
Cost per generation (LLM token usage vs output size)

alertingRules.name: SLO Fast Burn
alertingRules.triggerCondition: Consuming 2% of the monthly error budget in 1 hour
